TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Hdur, title = Hdur, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hdur} }

S.FORM: = Hdur = Nahari hdur laqi gaga,musa nganguc da!
S.PHON: = ħduɾ = naħaɾi ħduɾ laqi gaga,musa ŋaŋuʦ da!
S.FORM: = Hdur = Nahari hdur laqi gaga,musa nganguc da!
S.PHON: = ħduɾ = naħaɾi ħduɾ laqi gaga,musa ŋaŋuʦ da!
